metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code skills by Agent 37

plugins.name: yc-advisor
plugins.description: Provides access to Y Combinator's complete library of 434 curated startup resources including essays by Paul Graham, founder interviews, and startup school lectures.

plugins.name: local-review
plugins.description: Code review uncommitted local changes for bugs, security vulnerabilities, and CLAUDE.md compliance

plugins.name: generate-prompt-request
plugins.description: Generate a compact 'prompt request' one-pager that summarizes the current session for a pull request: every ask and decision folded into one User block, plus an Assistant summary of what was built.
